step_rationale: Eicosanoid; anti-platelet prostanoid downregulated post-PCI in STEMI, reflecting altered eicosanoid metabolism.
mechanism: PGE2 is an anti-platelet prostanoid whose post-intervention decline reflects resolution of acute platelet activation in STEMI.

references.title: Metabolomics reveal dynamic changes in eicosanoid profile in patients with ST-elevation myocardial infarction after percutaneous coronary intervention.
